title: Reservation Manager Vacancy at The Lalit Hotels - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Reservation Manager Vacancy at The Lalit Hotels - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Reservation Manager with drive and ambition, The Lalit Hotels in Amritsar is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About The Lalit Hotels:
The Lalit Hotels is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Assist in menu planning, costing, and food festival coordination
• Monitor F&B service quality and maintain hygiene standards
• Manage reservations and optimize room revenue through yield management
• Plan and execute banquets, events, and MICE functions
• Prepare daily operating reports and present to management
• Train and supervise front-line staff on service standards
• Manage procurement of hotel supplies and control operating costs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Tour Planning
• Proficiency in Hotel Management
• Proficiency in MICE
• Proficiency in HACCP
• Proficiency in Barista Skills
• Proficiency in OTA Management
• Proficiency in Event Management
• Proficiency in Housekeeping Standards

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Amritsar, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with The Lalit Hotels!
